### `ach_transfer`  (schema: `AchTransfer` · 23 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique ACH transfer identifier. |
| `account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The ledger account being debited or credited. |
| `account_number_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The specific account number used for this transfer. Determines the routing/account number pair that appears in the ACH file. |
| `direction` | string (enum: credit, debit) | ✓ |  |  | Direction of the ACH transfer from the perspective of this account. - `credit` — Push money out (originate a payment to an external party).… |
| `amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Transfer amount in cents. Must be positive. |
| `currency` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `status` | string (enum: pending_approval, submitted, settled, returned, rejected, canceled) | ✓ |  |  | ACH transfer lifecycle state. - `pending_approval` — Created, awaiting control engine evaluation. - `submitted` — Controls passed, ACH file… |
| `window` | string (enum: standard, same_day) | ✓ |  |  | ACH processing window. - `standard` — Next-day settlement (standard ACH). - `same_day` — Same-day ACH (additional fee may apply, cutoff tim… |
| `counterparty` | object | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `counterparty.routing_number` | string | ✓ |  |  | ABA routing number of the receiving institution. |
| `counterparty.account_number` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  | Account number at the receiving institution. |
| `counterparty.account_type` | string (enum: checking, savings) | ✓ |  |  | Account type at the receiving institution. |
| `counterparty.name` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  | Receiver name as it will appear in the ACH file. Max 22 characters per NACHA format. |
| `description` | string |  |  |  | Company entry description in the ACH batch header. Max 10 characters per NACHA format (e.g., "PAYROLL", "PAYMENT"). |
| `company_name` | string |  |  |  | Originator company name in the ACH batch header. Max 16 characters per NACHA format. Defaults to partner's registered name. |
| `effective_date` | string |  |  |  | The date the transfer will settle at the Fed. Set by the system based on the processing window and submission time. For same-day ACH, this… |
| `expected_settlement` | string |  |  |  | Estimated settlement timestamp. More precise than effective_date — accounts for Fed processing windows, weekends, and holidays. |
| `settled_at` | string |  |  |  | Actual settlement timestamp. Populated when status becomes `settled`. |
| `returned_at` | string |  |  |  | Timestamp of the return. Populated when status becomes `returned`. |
| `return_code` | string |  |  |  | NACHA return reason code (e.g., R01 Insufficient Funds, R02 Account Closed, R03 No Account, R04 Invalid Account Number). Only present when… |
| `return_reason` | string |  |  |  | Human-readable return reason. Only present when status is `returned`. |
| `rejection_reason` | string |  |  |  | Explanation of why the control engine rejected this transfer. Only present when status is `rejected`. |
| `control_results` | array<object> |  |  |  | Results of all control engine evaluations for this transfer. Populated at creation time (when the control engine gates the transfer). |
| `blnk_transaction_id` | string |  |  |  | Corresponding transaction ID in Blnk Deploy. |
| `metadata` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `book_transfer`  (schema: `BookTransfer` · 13 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique book transfer identifier. |
| `source_account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The account being debited. |
| `destination_account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The account being credited. |
| `amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Transfer amount in cents. |
| `currency` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `status` | string (enum: pending, completed, rejected) | ✓ |  |  | Book transfer lifecycle state. - `pending` — Created, control engine evaluating. - `completed` — Funds moved instantly (both sides settled)… |
| `description` | string |  |  |  | Free-text description of the transfer purpose. |
| `rejection_reason` | string |  |  |  | Explanation of why the control engine rejected this transfer. Only present when status is `rejected`. |
| `control_results` | array<object> |  |  |  | Results of control engine evaluations. |
| `blnk_transaction_id` | string |  |  |  | Corresponding transaction ID in Blnk Deploy. |
| `metadata` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `wire_transfer`  (schema: `WireTransfer` · 21 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique wire transfer identifier. |
| `account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The ledger account being debited (outbound) or credited (inbound). |
| `account_number_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The account number used for this wire. |
| `direction` | string (enum: outbound, inbound) | ✓ |  |  | Direction of the wire transfer. - `outbound` — Originated by this instance, sending funds via Fedwire. - `inbound` — Received from an exter… |
| `amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Transfer amount in cents. |
| `currency` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `status` | string (enum: pending_approval, submitted, completed, return_requested, returned, rejected, …(+1)) | ✓ |  |  | Wire transfer lifecycle state. - `pending_approval` — Created, awaiting control engine evaluation. - `submitted` — Controls passed, Fedwire… |
| `beneficiary` | object |  |  |  | The receiving party and their bank details for an outbound wire. |
| `beneficiary.name` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  | Beneficiary name as it will appear on the Fedwire message. |
| `beneficiary.routing_number` | string | ✓ |  |  | ABA routing number of the beneficiary's bank. |
| `beneficiary.account_number` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  | Account number at the beneficiary's bank. |
| `beneficiary.bank_name` | string |  |  |  | Name of the beneficiary's bank. Optional — if omitted, resolved automatically from the routing number via the Fed directory. |
| `beneficiary.address` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `beneficiary.address.line1` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  | Street address line 1. |
| `beneficiary.address.line2` | string |  |  |  | Street address line 2 (apt, suite, unit, etc.). |
| `beneficiary.address.city` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  |  |
| `beneficiary.address.state` | string | ✓ |  |  | Two-letter US state or territory code (ISO 3166-2:US). |
| `beneficiary.address.postal_code` | string | ✓ | ✓ |  | US ZIP code (5-digit or ZIP+4). |
| `beneficiary.address.country` | string | ✓ |  |  | ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. |
| `originator` | object |  |  |  | Originator information from an inbound Fedwire message. Read-only — populated by the aggregator when routing an inbound wire. |
| `originator.name` | string |  | ✓ |  |  |
| `originator.routing_number` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `originator.account_number` | string |  | ✓ |  |  |
| `originator.bank_name` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `originator.reference` | string |  |  |  | Originator-to-beneficiary information (OBI) from the Fedwire message. |
| `purpose` | string |  |  |  | Originator-to-beneficiary information (OBI). Free-text description of the wire purpose, included in the Fedwire message. |
| `imad` | string |  |  |  | Input Message Accountability Data — the Fed's unique identifier for this Fedwire message. Populated after submission. Used for tracing and… |
| `omad` | string |  |  |  | Output Message Accountability Data — assigned by the receiving Fed bank. Populated after the wire is acknowledged. |
| `submitted_at` | string |  |  |  | Timestamp when the Fedwire message was submitted. |
| `completed_at` | string |  |  |  | Timestamp when the wire completed. Wires are typically same-day. |
| `return_request` | object |  |  |  | Details of the return request, if one has been filed. Only present when status is `return_requested` or `returned`. |
| `rejection_reason` | string |  |  |  | Explanation of why the control engine rejected this wire. Only present when status is `rejected`. |
| `control_results` | array<object> |  |  |  | Results of control engine evaluations. |
| `blnk_transaction_id` | string |  |  |  | Corresponding transaction ID in Blnk Deploy. |
| `metadata` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `verification`  (schema: `Verification` · 14 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique verification identifier. |
| `entity_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The entity being verified. |
| `type` | string (enum: kyc, kyb) | ✓ |  |  | Whether this is identity verification for a person (KYC) or a business (KYB). Trusts use KYB. Joint entities are verified through their ind… |
| `provider` | string (enum: alloy, persona, socure, middesk, partner_provided) | ✓ |  |  | The identity verification provider used for this check. - `alloy`, `persona`, `socure`, `middesk` — Cassandra-managed providers. The system… |
| `trust_level` | string (enum: full, verify_watchlist_only) |  |  |  | Trust level for partner-provided verifications (from partner configuration). - `full` — Cassandra trusts the partner's identity verificatio… |
| `status` | string (enum: pending, in_review, approved, denied, expired) | ✓ |  |  | Status of this individual verification attempt. - `pending` — Verification submitted to provider, awaiting result. - `in_review` — Provider… |
| `ofac_result` | object | ✓ |  |  | Result of the mandatory OFAC screening. OFAC screening is a compliance floor control (BA-05) and runs on every verification regardless of p… |
| `ofac_result.screened_at` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `ofac_result.match_status` | string (enum: clear, potential_match, confirmed_match) |  |  |  | - `clear` — No matches found on SDN, consolidated sanctions, or PEP lists. - `potential_match` — Possible match requiring compliance office… |
| `ofac_result.matched_lists` | array<string> |  |  |  | Names of lists that returned matches (e.g., "SDN", "Consolidated Sanctions", "PEP", "314a"). Empty array when match_status is `clear`. |
| `ofac_result.match_score` | number |  |  |  | Confidence score of the strongest match (0-100). Only meaningful when match_status is `potential_match`. Used by compliance officers to pri… |
| `provider_result` | object |  |  |  | Normalized verification result from the provider. Cassandra translates each provider's native response into this common structure. |
| `provider_result.provider_reference` | string |  |  |  | The provider's native reference ID for this verification (e.g., Alloy evaluation_token, Persona inquiry_id). |
| `provider_result.provider_status` | string |  |  |  | The provider's native status string, preserved for debugging. Cassandra normalizes this into the verification's top-level `status`. |
| `provider_result.identity_verified` | boolean |  |  |  | Whether the provider confirmed the identity matches the provided data. |
| `provider_result.document_verified` | boolean |  |  |  | Whether identity documents were verified (if required by risk tier). Null if document verification was not required. |
| `provider_result.risk_score` | number |  |  |  | Provider's risk score, normalized to 0-100 range. Higher = riskier. Used by CDD controls for risk tiering. |
| `provider_result.risk_signals` | array<string> |  |  |  | Risk signal tags from the provider (e.g., "address_mismatch", "ssn_issued_prior_to_dob", "high_risk_jurisdiction"). Used by the control eng… |
| `provider_result.raw_response` | object |  |  |  | The complete provider response, stored verbatim for audit purposes. Only returned when the requesting token has compliance-scoped permissio… |
| `denial_reasons` | array<string> |  |  |  | Machine-readable reasons for denial (e.g., "identity_not_verified", "document_mismatch", "high_risk_jurisdiction", "ofac_match"). Only pres… |
| `expires_at` | string |  |  |  | When this verification result expires per CDD refresh policy. After expiry, the entity's kyc_status transitions to `expired` and a new veri… |
| `triggered_by` | string (enum: initial, cdd_refresh, information_change, manual) |  |  |  | What triggered this verification. - `initial` — First-time verification on entity creation. - `cdd_refresh` — Periodic re-verification per… |
| `metadata` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `card`  (schema: `Card` · 16 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique card identifier. |
| `account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The ledger account this card draws from / credits to. |
| `entity_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The entity this card is issued to. Must be a person entity. Immutable after creation. |
| `card_type` | string (enum: virtual, physical) | ✓ |  |  | - `virtual` — Instantly issued, PAN available immediately via secure details endpoint. - `physical` — Requires fulfillment (mailing). PAN a… |
| `form_factor` | string (enum: debit, prepaid) | ✓ |  |  | Card form factor for network classification. - `debit` — Linked to a deposit account with overdraft rules. - `prepaid` — Balance-limited, n… |
| `network` | string (enum: visa, mastercard) |  |  |  | Card network, determined by the BIN allocated to this instance. |
| `status` | string (enum: inactive, active, frozen, closed) | ✓ |  |  | Card lifecycle state, driven by the adapter interface (createCard, activateCard, freezeCard, closeCard). - `inactive` — Card created but no… |
| `last_four` | string | ✓ |  |  | Last four digits of the card number (PAN). |
| `expiration_month` | integer | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `expiration_year` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Four-digit expiration year. |
| `shipping` | object |  |  |  | Shipping details for physical cards. Only present when `card_type` is `physical`. Null for virtual cards. |
| `shipping.status` | string (enum: pending, shipped, delivered, returned) |  |  |  |  |
| `shipping.tracking_number` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `shipping.carrier` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `shipping.shipped_at` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `shipping.estimated_delivery` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `spend_controls` | object |  |  |  | Optional per-card spending limits. These are enforced in addition to account-level controls and the control engine's velocity limits. |
| `spend_controls.daily_limit` | integer |  |  |  | Maximum daily spend in cents. Null means no per-card daily limit. |
| `spend_controls.monthly_limit` | integer |  |  |  | Maximum monthly spend in cents. |
| `spend_controls.per_transaction_limit` | integer |  |  |  | Maximum single transaction amount in cents. |
| `spend_controls.allowed_mcc_codes` | array<string> |  |  |  | Whitelist of allowed Merchant Category Codes. If populated, only transactions at merchants with these MCCs are approved. Empty array means… |
| `spend_controls.blocked_mcc_codes` | array<string> |  |  |  | Blacklist of blocked MCCs. Transactions at merchants with these MCCs are declined. Evaluated after allowed_mcc_codes. |
| `processor_reference` | string |  |  |  | Card reference ID at the processor (Marqeta card_token or Lithic card_id). Opaque — used internally for adapter operations. |
| `metadata` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `card_authorization`  (schema: `CardAuthorization` · 14 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `card_id` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `status` | string (enum: pending, approved, declined, reversed, expired) | ✓ |  |  | Authorization lifecycle. - `pending` — Authorization received, control engine evaluating (transient, sub-2-second). - `approved` — Authoriz… |
| `amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Authorization amount in cents. |
| `currency` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `merchant` | object | ✓ |  |  | Merchant details from the authorization request. |
| `merchant.name` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `merchant.mcc` | string |  |  |  | Merchant Category Code. |
| `merchant.city` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `merchant.state` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `merchant.country` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `merchant.acceptor_id` | string |  |  |  | Card acceptor ID from the processor. |
| `decline_reason` | string (enum: insufficient_funds, card_frozen, card_closed, account_frozen, account_locked, spend_limit_exceeded, …(+5)) |  |  |  | Machine-readable reason for declining an authorization. |
| `control_results` | array<object> |  |  |  | Control engine results for this authorization. Includes balance check, velocity, OFAC, fraud, and spend control evaluations. |
| `blnk_transaction_id` | string |  |  |  | Blnk inflight transaction ID (for approved authorizations). Null for declined authorizations. |
| `processor_reference` | string |  |  |  | Processor's native authorization reference. |
| `settled_at` | string |  |  |  | Settlement timestamp. Populated when the inflight transaction commits in Blnk (processor sends settlement webhook). Null until settled. |
| `settlement_amount` | integer |  |  |  | Final settlement amount in cents. May differ from the authorization amount (e.g., tip added, partial fulfillment). |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `bookkeeping_entry`  (schema: `BookkeepingEntry` · 17 fields · retention: 7y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique bookkeeping entry identifier. |
| `account_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The ledger account this entry pertains to. |
| `account_number_id` | string |  |  |  | The specific account number involved (if applicable). Null for account-level entries (e.g., interest, fees). |
| `entity_id` | string |  |  |  | The entity attributed for FBO segregation. Derived from the account's primary owner or the account number's informational_entity_id, depend… |
| `entry_type` | string (enum: debit, credit, hold_placed, hold_released, hold_seized) | ✓ |  |  | Type of bookkeeping entry. - `debit` — Funds left the account (matches a Blnk debit transaction). - `credit` — Funds entered the account (m… |
| `source` | string (enum: ach_transfer, wire_transfer, book_transfer, card_authorization, card_settlement, fee, …(+3)) | ✓ |  |  | The originating transaction type that produced this bookkeeping entry. Maps 1:1 to the domain event that triggered the Blnk webhook. |
| `source_id` | string |  |  |  | ID of the originating resource (e.g., ach_5kRb3m for an ACH transfer, auth_2nRb7m for a card authorization). Allows joining bookkeeping ent… |
| `amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Entry amount in cents. Always positive — direction is conveyed by entry_type. |
| `currency` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `running_balance` | integer |  |  |  | Account balance after this entry was applied (cents). Provides a verifiable audit trail — each entry's running_balance should equal the pre… |
| `account_code_5300` | string | ✓ |  |  | NCUA 5300 account code for this entry (e.g., 025B for share drafts, 010 for regular shares). Inherited from the account's bookkeeping tags… |
| `schedule_a_code` | string |  |  |  | 5300 Schedule A line item code for balance sheet classification. Used by the 5300 Reporter for aggregated reporting. |
| `fbo_classification` | string (enum: customer_balance, commingled_cash, settlement) | ✓ |  |  | FBO sub-account classification for the bookkeeping layer. - `customer_balance` — Holds attributed to a specific end-user entity. - `comming… |
| `blnk_transaction_id` | string |  |  |  | Corresponding Blnk Deploy transaction ID. Null for compliance hold entries (which are Cassandra-native, not Blnk transactions). |
| `description` | string |  |  |  | System-generated description of the entry (e.g., "ACH credit from John Doe via 271070801", "Compliance hold placed — BA-05 OFAC match"). |
| `effective_date` | string |  |  |  | The business date this entry is effective for regulatory reporting. May differ from created_at for entries posted after business hours or f… |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `event`  (schema: `Event` · 11 fields · retention: 7y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique event identifier. |
| `type` | string (enum: entity.created, entity.activated, entity.disabled, entity.archived, entity.updated, entity.locked, …(+51)) | ✓ |  |  | Domain event type. Events are emitted on every state transition and significant operation. Partners receive these via webhook delivery. |
| `resource_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | ID of the resource that changed (e.g., ent_abc123, acct_xyz789). |
| `resource_type` | string | ✓ |  |  | Type of the resource (e.g., entity, account, ach_transfer). |
| `data` | object |  |  |  | Snapshot of the resource at the time of the event. Contains the full resource representation (same schema as the corresponding GET endpoint… |
| `previous_data` | object |  |  |  | For update events, the resource state before the change. Only includes fields that changed. Null for creation events. |
| `delivery_status` | string (enum: pending, delivered, failed, expired) |  |  |  | Delivery status for a specific webhook delivery attempt. - `pending` — Queued for delivery (or retrying). - `delivered` — Partner endpoint… |
| `delivery_attempts` | integer |  |  |  | Number of webhook delivery attempts made so far (max 12). |
| `last_delivery_attempt_at` | string |  |  |  | Timestamp of the most recent delivery attempt. |
| `delivered_at` | string |  |  |  | Timestamp of successful delivery. Null if not yet delivered. |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `webhook_endpoint`  (schema: `WebhookEndpoint` · 9 fields)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  | Unique webhook endpoint identifier. |
| `url` | string | ✓ |  |  | The HTTPS URL that receives webhook POST requests. Must use HTTPS (HTTP rejected). Must return 2xx within 30 seconds to be considered a suc… |
| `status` | string (enum: active, disabled) | ✓ |  |  | - `active` — Events are delivered to this endpoint. - `disabled` — Delivery is paused. Events accumulate and can be retrieved via the backf… |
| `subscribed_events` | array<string> | ✓ |  |  | List of event type patterns this endpoint receives. Supports exact types (e.g., "ach_transfer.settled") and wildcard prefixes (e.g., "ach_t… |
| `signing_secret` | string |  |  |  | HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for verifying webhook payloads. Only returned once at creation time. Use to verify the `X-Cassandra-Signature` h… |
| `delivery_stats` | object |  |  |  | Rolling delivery statistics for this endpoint. |
| `delivery_stats.total_delivered` | integer |  |  |  |  |
| `delivery_stats.total_failed` | integer |  |  |  |  |
| `delivery_stats.last_delivered_at` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `delivery_stats.last_failed_at` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `delivery_stats.current_failure_streak` | integer |  |  |  | Consecutive failed deliveries. When this reaches a threshold, the endpoint may be automatically disabled and the partner alerted. |
| `metadata` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `fbo_position`  (schema: `FboPosition` · 6 fields)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `instance_id` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `balance` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Current FBO balance for this instance (cents). Sum of all settled inbound minus all settled outbound for this instance's accounts. |
| `held_amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Amount currently reserved for pending outbound payments (cents). Held via the reserve saga pattern (Decision 28, step 4). |
| `available_balance` | integer | ✓ |  |  | Effective available balance (cents). Computed as `balance - held_amount`. This is the amount the Origination API checks against when approv… |
| `last_event_sequence` | integer | ✓ |  |  | The sequence_id of the most recent event processed by the Payment Hub consumer for this instance. Used for staleness detection. |
| `updated_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

### `inbound_payment`  (schema: `InboundPayment` · 9 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `payment_type` | string (enum: ach_credit, ach_debit, wire, rtp) | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `account_number` | string | ✓ |  |  | The 12-digit account number this payment was routed to. |
| `amount` | integer | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `currency` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `status` | string (enum: pending, delivered, acknowledged) | ✓ |  |  | - `pending` — Aggregator has the payment, not yet pushed to instance. - `delivered` — Pushed to instance via webhook. - `acknowledged` — In… |
| `originator` | object |  |  |  |  |
| `originator.name` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `originator.routing_number` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `originator.account_number` | string |  |  |  |  |
| `reference` | string |  |  |  | Originator reference or trace number. |
| `received_at` | string | ✓ |  |  | When the aggregator received this payment from the Fed. |

### `bsa_alert`  (schema: `BsaAlert` · 9 fields · retention: 5y)

| Field | Type | Required | PII | Bound controls | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `alert_id` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |
| `event_id` | string | ✓ |  |  | The event that triggered this alert. |
| `alert_type` | string (enum: ctr_threshold, structuring_suspected, cross_fintech_activity, sar_candidate, velocity_anomaly, watchlist_hit) | ✓ |  |  | Type of BSA alert generated by the BSA Approver (real-time) or BSA Reporter (scheduled). |
| `entity_hash` | string | ✓ |  |  | Hashed entity identifier (SSN/EIN hash). Used for per-entity lookups without exposing PII in the alert table. |
| `instance_id` | string |  |  |  | The fintech instance where the triggering event originated. For cross-fintech alerts, this is the instance of the most recent triggering ev… |
| `status` | string (enum: open, under_review, escalated, cleared, block) | ✓ |  |  | BSA alert lifecycle. - `open` — New alert, not yet reviewed. - `under_review` — Analyst is investigating. - `escalated` — Elevated to SAR c… |
| `requires_lookback` | boolean |  |  |  | Whether the BSA Reporter should run a deep historical analysis on this alert. Set by the BSA Approver when it detects patterns that need 90… |
| `details` | object |  |  |  | Alert-specific details. Structure varies by alert_type. Examples: transaction amounts, pattern description, matched entity information for… |
| `created_at` | string | ✓ |  |  |  |

## Events

> ⚠️  **Vocabulary warning — no events defined.** The `events` array in vocabulary.json is empty. Any `(event.code)` reference the policy wants to use must be introduced by engineering and registered in the spec before the Design Overlay v2 blocks can cite it. The endpoints list below is provided as candidate signals from which engineering could derive event codes (e.g., `POST /accounts` → `account.created`).

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Summary | Control refs | Audit events |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/entities` | List entities |  |  |
| `GET` | `/entities/{entity_id}` | Retrieve an entity |  |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/person` | Create a person entity | CD-01, CD-04, BA-03, BA-05 |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/business` | Create a business entity | CD-01, CD-04, CD-05, BA-03, BA-05 |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/trust` | Create a trust entity | CD-01, CD-04, BA-03, BA-05 |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/joint` | Create a joint entity | BA-05 |  |
| `PATCH` | `/entities/person/{entity_id}` | Update a person entity | CD-09, BA-05 |  |
| `PATCH` | `/entities/business/{entity_id}` | Update a business entity | CD-05, CD-09 |  |
| `PATCH` | `/entities/trust/{entity_id}` | Update a trust entity | CD-09 |  |
| `PATCH` | `/entities/joint/{entity_id}` | Update a joint entity |  |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/{entity_id}/status` | Transition entity status | BA-05, CD-08 |  |
| `PUT` | `/entities/{entity_id}/lock` | Update entity lock |  |  |
| `GET` | `/accounts` | List accounts |  |  |
| `POST` | `/accounts` | Create an account | CD-04, CD-03, CD-12, BA-05 |  |
| `GET` | `/accounts/{account_id}` | Retrieve an account |  |  |
| `PATCH` | `/accounts/{account_id}` | Update an account | CD-05 |  |
| `POST` | `/accounts/{account_id}/status` | Transition account status | CD-12 |  |
| `PUT` | `/accounts/{account_id}/lock` | Update account lock |  |  |
| `GET` | `/accounts/{account_id}/account-numbers` | List account numbers for an account |  |  |
| `POST` | `/accounts/{account_id}/account-numbers` | Create an additional account number | BA-05 |  |
| `GET` | `/account-numbers/{account_number_id}` | Retrieve an account number |  |  |
| `PATCH` | `/account-numbers/{account_number_id}` | Update an account number |  |  |
| `POST` | `/account-numbers/{account_number_id}/status` | Transition account number status |  |  |
| `GET` | `/transfers/ach` | List ACH transfers |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/ach` | Create an ACH transfer | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08, BA-10, CD-06 |  |
| `GET` | `/transfers/ach/{ach_transfer_id}` | Retrieve an ACH transfer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/ach/{ach_transfer_id}/cancel` | Cancel an ACH transfer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/ach/batch` | Create a batch of ACH transfers | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08, BA-10, CD-06 |  |
| `GET` | `/transfers/book` | List book transfers |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/book` | Create a book transfer | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08 |  |
| `GET` | `/transfers/book/{book_transfer_id}` | Retrieve a book transfer |  |  |
| `GET` | `/transfers/wire` | List wire transfers |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/wire` | Create a wire transfer | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08, BA-10 |  |
| `GET` | `/transfers/wire/{wire_transfer_id}` | Retrieve a wire transfer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/wire/{wire_transfer_id}/cancel` | Cancel a wire transfer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/transfers/wire/{wire_transfer_id}/return-request` | Request a wire return |  |  |
| `GET` | `/entities/{entity_id}/verifications` | List verifications for an entity |  |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/{entity_id}/verifications` | Initiate a verification | CD-01, CD-04, BA-03, BA-05, BA-20 |  |
| `POST` | `/entities/{entity_id}/verifications/attest` | Submit a partner-provided KYC/KYB attestation | CD-01, CD-10, BA-05, BA-20 |  |
| `GET` | `/verifications/{verification_id}` | Retrieve a verification |  |  |
| `GET` | `/cards` | List cards |  |  |
| `POST` | `/cards` | Create a card | BA-05, CD-04 |  |
| `GET` | `/cards/{card_id}` | Retrieve a card |  |  |
| `PATCH` | `/cards/{card_id}` | Update a card |  |  |
| `POST` | `/cards/{card_id}/status` | Transition card status |  |  |
| `GET` | `/cards/{card_id}/sensitive` | Retrieve sensitive card details | PR-01 |  |
| `GET` | `/cards/{card_id}/authorizations` | List authorizations for a card |  |  |
| `GET` | `/authorizations/{authorization_id}` | Retrieve a card authorization |  |  |
| `GET` | `/accounts/{account_id}/bookkeeping-entries` | List bookkeeping entries for an account |  |  |
| `GET` | `/bookkeeping-entries/{entry_id}` | Retrieve a bookkeeping entry |  |  |
| `GET` | `/bookkeeping/summary` | Get aggregated bookkeeping summary |  |  |
| `GET` | `/bookkeeping/reconciliation` | Run reconciliation check |  |  |
| `GET` | `/events` | List events |  |  |
| `GET` | `/events/{event_id}` | Retrieve an event |  |  |
| `POST` | `/events/{event_id}/retry` | Retry event delivery |  |  |
| `GET` | `/webhooks` | List webhook endpoints |  |  |
| `POST` | `/webhooks` | Create a webhook endpoint |  |  |
| `GET` | `/webhooks/{webhook_endpoint_id}` | Retrieve a webhook endpoint |  |  |
| `PATCH` | `/webhooks/{webhook_endpoint_id}` | Update a webhook endpoint |  |  |
| `DELETE` | `/webhooks/{webhook_endpoint_id}` | Delete a webhook endpoint |  |  |
| `POST` | `/webhooks/{webhook_endpoint_id}/rotate-secret` | Rotate webhook signing secret |  |  |
| `POST` | `/webhooks/{webhook_endpoint_id}/test` | Send a test webhook |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/kyc/approve` | Simulate: Approve KYC verification |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/kyc/deny` | Simulate: Deny KYC verification |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/ach/receive` | Simulate: Receive an inbound ACH credit |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/ach/settle` | Simulate: Settle an outbound ACH transfer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/ach/return` | Simulate: Return a settled ACH transfer |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/wire/receive` | Simulate: Receive an inbound wire |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/wire/settle` | Simulate: Complete an outbound wire |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/card/authorize` | Simulate: Card authorization |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/card/settle` | Simulate: Card settlement |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/simulate/time/advance` | Simulate: Advance sandbox clock |  |  |
| `POST` | `/sandbox/reset` | Reset sandbox environment |  |  |
| `POST` | `/auth/token` | Obtain an aggregator access token |  |  |
| `GET` | `/fbo/{instance_id}/position` | Get FBO position for an instance |  |  |
| `GET` | `/fbo/{instance_id}/available-balance` | Get available balance for an instance |  |  |
| `POST` | `/payments/ach/originate` | Originate an ACH payment | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08 |  |
| `POST` | `/payments/wire/originate` | Originate a wire payment | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08, BA-10 |  |
| `POST` | `/payments/wire/prepare` | Prepare a wire payment (phase 1 of 2) | BA-05, BA-06, BA-07, BA-08, BA-10 |  |
| `POST` | `/payments/wire/confirm` | Confirm a prepared wire payment (phase 2 of 2) |  |  |

| `GET` | `/inbound/{instance_id}` | List inbound payments for an instance |  |  |

LOCAL OVERRIDES (apply after all meta-prompt rules):
{{Usually empty. Put anything here that should override the shared
`meta-prompt.md` for THIS policy only — a different control-ID prefix,
extra required sections, a specific citation style, etc. The regeneration
task applies overrides AFTER the shared meta-prompt, so instructions here
win.}}
